title: Stackyard
description: Stackyard is a website-only, copy-paste UI component library built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Users browse categorized sections (hero, pricing, CTA, navbar, footer, FAQ, testimonials, and more), preview them live, and copy self-contained, dependency-free source code straight into their own projects — no CLI or npm install required. The library supports free and pro (paid) component tiers.

relatedProjects.title: Treepost AI
relatedProjects.description: Treepost AI is a Canadian marketplace platform that connects homeowners with certified tree service contractors through AI-powered price estimates, real-time bidding, secure payments, and direct communication. The platform simplifies the process of finding trusted contractors by replacing manual quote requests with instant AI estimates, verified professionals, and a transparent bidding system.

relatedProjects.title: Extra Scrub
relatedProjects.description: Extra Scrub Cleaning Services Website is a professional multi-page business website built for a cleaning company based in London. The platform helps customers explore residential and commercial cleaning services, request custom quotes, book appointments online, and contact the team easily. The goal was to create a modern, mobile-friendly digital presence that improves customer trust, simplifies service discovery, and increases booking conversions.

relatedProjects.title: BRIEFS Coach
relatedProjects.description: B.R.I.E.F.S. Coach is an AI-powered mental coaching platform that helps users record voice-based emotional “vents” and receive instant AI-generated coaching guidance with relevant YouTube video recommendations. The platform enables organizations and practitioners to provide scalable mental wellness support by combining voice recording, GPT-4 coaching responses, coach management, and subscription-based team access.

title: Survey Management System
description: Feedback Hub is a full-stack SaaS platform for creating feedback forms, sharing them via public links, and analyzing responses in real-time. It replaces tools like Google Forms and Typeform with a modern, team-oriented experience featuring rich analytics, workspace management, and billing/subscription support.

relatedProjects.title: Real Estate Media Pricing Calculator
relatedProjects.description: Real Estate Media Pricing Calculator is a web-based pricing platform that helps real estate media professionals generate accurate, market-based pricing recommendations for photography, videography, drone services, floor plans, virtual staging, and twilight photography across the United States. The platform uses verified market data from 2,695 real estate media businesses to provide location-specific pricing ranges with confidence ratings, helping professionals price services competitively and confidently.

relatedProjects.title: Extra Scrub
relatedProjects.description: Extra Scrub Cleaning Services Website is a professional multi-page business website built for a cleaning company based in London. The platform helps customers explore residential and commercial cleaning services, request custom quotes, book appointments online, and contact the team easily. The goal was to create a modern, mobile-friendly digital presence that improves customer trust, simplifies service discovery, and increases booking conversions.

relatedProjects.title: DTF Printing Customer Portal
relatedProjects.description: Urban DTF Customer Portal is a full-stack web application built for URBAN DTF & T-SHIRTS, a custom DTF printing business. The platform allows customers to upload designs, configure garment orders, make secure payments, and track production progress in real time. It helps streamline order management, reduce manual communication, and improve customer experience by transforming traditional printing operations into a fully digital workflow.

title: Treepost AI
description: Treepost AI is a Canadian marketplace platform that connects homeowners with certified tree service contractors through AI-powered price estimates, real-time bidding, secure payments, and direct communication. The platform simplifies the process of finding trusted contractors by replacing manual quote requests with instant AI estimates, verified professionals, and a transparent bidding system.

children.text: Homeowners struggled to find trusted tree contractors and had no way to compare fair pricing before hiring. Getting quotes meant contacting multiple contractors manually — slow, inconsistent, and unreliable. Unverified contractors, payment disputes, and zero transparency made the whole experience frustrating for both sides.

Treepost AI built a digital marketplace that replaces the entire offline process. Homeowners post once and get instant AI-powered price estimates, browse verified contractors, and pay securely — all in one place. Contractors get qualified local leads, a bidding system, and real-time messaging without chasing clients.
Homeowners receive instant project estimates using AI with up to 95% pricing accuracy before reviewing contractor bids.
Users can post jobs with detailed descriptions, photos, and videos to help contractors assess project scope accurately.
Contractors must submit licenses, insurance, and WSIB documentation before approval, ensuring a trusted service network.
Verified contractors browse available jobs and submit bids, allowing homeowners to compare pricing and choose the best fit.
Built-in messaging enables direct communication between homeowners and contractors for faster decisions and better coordination.
Secure payment handling protects both parties by ensuring safe transactions throughout the project lifecycle.
Admins manage users, contractor approvals, analytics, platform reports, and AI feedback improvements from a centralized dashboard.
The pricing engine provided highly accurate instant estimates, reducing uncertainty before contractor selection.
The platform successfully built a strong network of homeowners and verified contractors across the Canadian market.
Transparent pricing, verified professionals, and secure workflows significantly improved user trust and satisfaction.
Strict contractor verification ensured all service providers met professional and legal compliance standards.
AI estimates and bidding reduced the time required to find and hire trusted contractors compared to traditional manual processes.
Improved frontend scalability by managing complex multi-role dashboards and reusable component systems.
Strengthened expertise in building highly polished responsive interfaces across all device sizes.
Learned how to structure real-time messaging and notifications for seamless user communication.
Handled bidding workflows, contractor verification states, and AI estimate feedback flows efficiently.
Gained experience integrating AI-generated estimates with user feedback systems for continuous platform improvement.
Built secure and intuitive interfaces for homeowners, contractors, and admins with different access levels.

relatedProjects.title: Insight Carrier
relatedProjects.description: Insight Carrier is a B2B SaaS platform built for insurance agents, brokers, and carriers to access qualified trucking leads, company safety profiles, and policy renewal opportunities. The platform helps insurance professionals reduce manual research time, identify high-value prospects faster, and improve client retention using real-time motor carrier data.
